title: cirsium esculentum
intro: Cirsium esculentum, also known as the thistle or artichoke thistle, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Cirsium esculentum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Cirsium esculentum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support immune function. Cirsium esculentum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots and leaves can also be used in traditional medicine.
